cases.title: Wire and connector cavity signal disagree
cases.rationale: Checks that a wire cannot silently carry a different signal than the cavity assignment at either endpoint.

cases.title: Conductor gauge is outside the declared connector range
cases.rationale: Checks the executable range behavior with a deliberately limited synthetic part. The values model a datasheet constraint but do not identify a commercial part.

cases.title: Overcurrent protection exceeds conductor ampacity
cases.rationale: Checks that a protection rating above the configured conductor ampacity is reported.
